message:
feat(web): add gzip-compressed database support with worker decompression

Service Worker (sw.ts):
- Extend database caching route to include .db.gz files
- StaleWhileRevalidate strategy for both .db and .db.gz

Gzip Decompression Worker (gzip-decompress.worker.ts):
- New worker using pako for gzip decompression
- Receives compressed data, returns decompressed ArrayBuffer
- Transfers buffer back to main thread for efficiency
- Handles edge case where Uint8Array may be view into larger buffer
- Clean error handling with structured WorkerRequest/WorkerResponse types

Package Dependencies (package.json):
- Add pako ^2.1.0 for gzip decompression

Compressed Database (phage.db.gz):
- Gzip-compressed version of phage.db
- Significantly smaller for network transfer (~70-80% reduction typical)

This enables faster initial loads by:
1. Preferring native DecompressionStream('gzip') when available
2. Falling back to pako in a web worker to avoid main thread blocking
3. Serving compressed database for reduced bandwidth

The actual DatabaseLoader integration uses these components to
transparently load either .db or .db.gz based on availability.

Refs: phage_explorer-rrqx.2
